intro: White Plains homeowners and businesses face unique raccoon challenges due to the city's mix of urban development and proximity to wooded areas along the Bronx River Parkway. Our professional raccoon removal services protect White Plains properties from these intelligent, persistent wildlife intruders. Best Pest Control NYC provides humane, effective raccoon trapping, exclusion, and sanitation services throughout Westchester County.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over a decade of wildlife control experience to White Plains, with certified technicians who understand local raccoon behavior patterns in Westchester. We offer same-day emergency response, humane removal methods, comprehensive exclusion work, and full attic restoration services with upfront pricing and guaranteed results.
localContext: White Plains' diverse neighborhoods—from the high-rise apartments downtown near City Center to the single-family homes in Gedney Farms and Reynal Park—all experience raccoon activity, especially properties near wooded corridors and parks like Chatterton Hill. The city's mature trees, accessible garbage areas, and older homes with vulnerable roof lines make raccoon intrusions particularly common in spring and fall.

faqs.question: How much does raccoon removal cost in White Plains?
faqs.answer: Raccoon removal in White Plains typically costs between $900 and $4,000 depending on the severity of the infestation, number of raccoons, accessibility of entry points, and extent of damage. A single raccoon removal with basic exclusion starts around $900, while complex cases involving multiple animals, attic cleanup, extensive repairs, and ongoing prevention can reach $4,000. We provide free inspections and detailed estimates before beginning work.

faqs.question: Are raccoons common in White Plains, NY?
faqs.answer: Yes, raccoons are very common in White Plains due to the city's combination of urban resources and natural habitat corridors along the Bronx River and surrounding wooded areas. They're frequently found in attics, chimneys, and crawl spaces throughout White Plains neighborhoods, particularly in spring when mothers seek denning sites and in fall when they prepare for winter. The abundance of food sources and shelter makes White Plains ideal raccoon habitat.

faqs.question: Is raccoon removal in White Plains humane and legal?
faqs.answer: Yes, our raccoon removal services in White Plains comply with all New York State Department of Environmental Conservation regulations and Westchester County ordinances. We use humane live trapping methods, never harm animals, and follow proper relocation protocols. Our technicians are licensed and trained in ethical wildlife control practices that prioritize animal welfare while effectively resolving your raccoon problem.

faqs.question: What does raccoon removal service include in White Plains?
faqs.answer: Our comprehensive raccoon removal service in White Plains includes a thorough property inspection, humane trapping and removal of all raccoons, identification and sealing of all entry points, attic damage assessment, cleanup of feces and contaminated insulation, odor elimination, and preventative exclusion work to ensure raccoons cannot return. We also offer repair services for damaged soffits, vents, roof shingles, and insulation, with follow-up visits to guarantee complete resolution.
